source: BSData wh40k-10e catalog (cross-referenced against Wahapedia keyword list, verified 2026-03-10)
notes: BattleScribe stores a 'Bladeguard Veterans' model entry inside the 'Bladeguard Veteran Squad' unit entry.
Stats and weapons are on the model entry; keywords, infoLinks, and pts=80 are on the unit entry.
ADEPTUS ASTARTES keyword comes from 'Faction: Adeptus Astartes' category — same known gap.
Rules (Oath of Moment, Templar Vows) are infoLinks on the *unit* entry, not the model entry.
Invulnerable Save (4+) is a profile-type infoLink on the unit entry — not a rule node.
Bladeguard (Swords/Shields of the Imperium) is an inline ability profile — not expected as a rule.
A sibling 'Bladeguard Veteran Sergeant' model entry exists with an optional Plasma Pistol and
Neo-volkite Pistol; sergeant's weapons may appear as extra weapons via options-expansion.
pts=80 is on the Bladeguard Veteran Squad unit entry; model entry has no own pts cost.

knownDiscrepancies.note: Cross-faction confirmation of the TYRANIDS keyword gap.
Oath of Moment and Templar Vows are infoLinks on the Bladeguard Veteran Squad unit entry. Expected to not surface for the model entry via current pipeline.
